$comment: Example MCP client configuration for this project. Copy to .mcp.json (Claude Code) or merge into ~/.config/claude/mcp.json. For HTTP transport, generate a token from the module's 'Agent Access (AI clients)' card (temporary, module-scoped) or use a legacy MCP API key from My Account. Never commit real tokens. See docs/agent-access.md.

bh-finance-local.$comment: Local development over stdio — no token required; runs as the app itself.

bh-finance.$comment: Production over HTTP — replace <your-token> with an agent setup token (bha_...) or legacy MCP API key.
